expectations.evidence: Mentions before_tool_call and after_tool_call hooks in the plugin configuration
Does not provide the correct OpenClaw config.json format. Shows invented shell commands like 'agent-heart exec --lock --stdin' instead of 'npx agent-heart hook openclaw'.
Does not explain command family mapping or openclaw/-prefixed service names. No mention of how binaries map to families.
States 'all exec tool calls will be tracked automatically' and 'fully automatic'
